title: Loki’s Past Deepens
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Usopp, Nami, Children, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's the old way!! Elbaf has changed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: People never change! That same bloodlist is still pushing through you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Can't you two just enjoy the meal?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys should know that if you follow a man like him, you'll only be led to ruin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Following?! That morow?! JIHA HA!! Don't make me laugh!! We're all completely out for ourselves!! None of us would bat an eye if rocks died!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... that's not to say his plans don't have a certain appeal, they could prove very lucrative.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you heard of Hachinosu? The place they call the Isle of Exiles, or even pirate Island.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: SHIKI THE WICKED (future golden lion)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: countries all around the world send their worst inmates there as a form of penal exile.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: (future Golden Lion)

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: Miss Buckin The Tech Bandit (Buckingham Stussy)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: DON MARLON (gangster from the west blue)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: (Gangster from the West Blue)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was meant to be a barren island with no food, where all you could do was wait for death.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But last year, the survivors started banding together.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And why do you think that happened?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Believe it or not, the island had a massive gold deposit. A Shadow! Organization found out and got involved! They helped the criminals amass a fortune. That really kissed off the government!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: EDWARD NEWGATE (future whitebeard)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PIRATE PROPHET OCHOKU (future commodore of pirate Island)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: 3/2/01 The Smuggler)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These days, anyone who gets near the island gets swarmed by the hardened criminals. They'll strip you of everything!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So then, we cut a deal with the government! I asked, "How much are you gonna pay us if we take that island back for you guys?"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once we get the money we'll take down "pirate Island" and split the mountain-load of loot between us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there's no way in hell we're just Handin' over the island and those criminals after that, get it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll take charge of Hachinosu, and with these dumbasses under me, we'll turn it into a pirate paradise!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can already see the Government and Marines standin' there like clueless dogs! Voha HA HA HA HA HA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is just the prologue to my life!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: usin' that island as me base...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll crush the navy, bring the holy land crashin' down! And after that...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be King of the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your enemies are too big. You're picking a fight with the whole planet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say what you want! One day someone's bound to pull it off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no such thing as power that lasts forever!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Join me, Harald!! If we team up, we will be unstoppable!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
